name: 16) Thai Chicken & Slaw
method: In a small bowl, whisk the canola oil, white wine vinegar, honey, gingerroot, soy sauce, garlic cloves, and sesame oil until combined.
In a small bowl, whisk the canola oil, white wine vinegar, honey, gingerroot, soy sauce, garlic cloves, and sesame oil until combined.
Pour 1 cup of the mixture (Step 1) into a bowl or shallow dish. Add the chicken into the mixture and marinate (refrigerated) overnight. Cover the rest of the mixture and refrigerate.
Pour 1 cup of the mixture (Step 1) into a bowl or shallow dish. Add the chicken into the mixture and marinate (refrigerated) overnight. Cover the rest of the mixture and refrigerate.
Drain the chicken and discard the mixture from the bowl.
Drain the chicken and discard the mixture from the bowl.
Add peanut butter and salt to the remaining mixture (Step 2) and stir until combined. Pour over coleslaw mixture (Step 5) and toss well. Refrigerate until serving.
Add peanut butter and salt to the remaining mixture (Step 2) and stir until combined. Pour over coleslaw mixture (Step 5) and toss well. Refrigerate until serving.
Serve the chicken (Step 4) with the salad (Step 6). Top with green onions.
Serve the chicken (Step 4) with the salad (Step 6). Top with green onions.
